name: @quoin/tokens-govuk
description: GOV.UK Design System palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: GOV.UK $govuk-palette extracted from settings/_colours-palette--internal.scss. Deliberately stripped palette — blue/green/red/yellow with primary + tint/shade variants. Extraction method: B. Algorithm: alphagov/govuk-frontend@main, inputs {"path":"settings/_colours-palette--internal.scss"}. Mapping: GOV.UK palette uses semantic variant names (primary, tint-25, tint-50, tint-80, shade-25, shade-50). Accent = blue.primary (#1d70b8), critical = red.primary, success = green.primary.
